what_it_proves: Local EgoDesktop PSPC Reply Preview can consume validated semantic event packets and deterministically update preview proxy state without keyword-hardcoded category routing in pspcReplyPreview.js.
what_it_does_not_prove: It does not prove PSPC mainline integration, true learning, durable memory, runtime integration safety, stable real user benefit, live autonomy, consciousness, subjective experience, or real emotion.
